artPrompt: A towering oak pulpit rises alone in the frame, six feet of carved dark wood lit from within by guttering gold candlelight, soundproofed and forbidding, its high lectern empty against a looming clock tower and blood-dark sky. No figure, only the imposing sacred furniture and drifting smoke. Wide landscape composition, bone white and cold gold washes bleeding into deep black. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: The Doomsday Pulpit
text:
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
{2}, {T}: Put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and you gain 1 life. The sermon is free; the dread is included.
flavorText: Six feet tall, oak, and entirely soundproof from the inside. The preacher cannot hear you leave.
